carpet.rule.safeScaffoldingBreak.desc: Require holding scaffolding or an empty main hand to break scaffolding.
carpet.rule.crafterStopsWhenOutputBlocke: Prevent the crafter from crafting when its output points to a valid auto-accepting container that cannot fully accept the crafted result and recipe remainders.
message.carpet-ice-addition.safe_scaffol: Hold scaffolding or empty your main hand to break scaffolding.
